member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetPracticeAsync
member.remarks:
Returns general information (name, address, hours of operation) about the practice.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetPractice"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.response: Practice and site information is returned

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetPracticesAsync
member.remarks:
Returns general information (name, address, hours of operation) about all audigy practices.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetPractice"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.response: Practice and site information is returned

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetLocationsAsync
member.remarks:
Returns general information (name, address, hours of operation) about each location.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetLocations"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetPatientAsync(System.Int32)
member.remarks:
Returns a single patient by id.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetPatient?patientId=22"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.response: If exists, the patient record is returned, otherwise null
member.param: the id of the patient

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetAudiogramsAsync(System.Int32)
member.remarks:
Returns a list of audiograms in date order.
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetAudiograms?patientId=22"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.response: A list of audiograms is returned
member.param: the id of the patient

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetEmployeesAsync(System.Boolean)
member.remarks:
Returns all employees
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetEmployees?includeInactive=true"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.response: A list of employees is returned
member.param: If true, inactive employees are included

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetAudiologistsAsync(System.Boolean)
member.remarks:
Returns all audiologists
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetAudiologists?includeInactive=true"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.response: A list of audiologists is returned
member.param: If true, inactive audiologists are included

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetPatientsAsync(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.remarks:
Returns patients
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetPatients"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.param: Optional: From date inclusive to get patients from
Optional: To date inclusive to get patients to
member.response: A list of patients is returned

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetAppointmentsAsync(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.remarks:
Returns Appointments
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetAppointments"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.param: Optional: From date inclusive to get appointments from
Optional: To date inclusive to get appointments to
member.response: A list of appointments is returned

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetUnitsSoldAsync(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.remarks:
Returns Units Sold
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetUnitsSold"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.param: Optional: From date inclusive to get units sold from
Optional: To date inclusive to get units sold to
member.response: A list of units sold is returned

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetUnitsReturnedAsync(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.remarks:
Returns Units Returned
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetUnitsReturned"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.param: Optional: From date inclusive to get units returned from
Optional: To date inclusive to get units returned to
member.response: A list of units returned is returned

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetAppointmentAsync(System.Int32)
member.remarks:
Returns Appointment
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetAppointment?appointmentId=22"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.param: Id of the appointment
member.response: Appointment is returned if found, otherwise null

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetInvoicesAsync(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.remarks:
Returns Invoices
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetInvoices"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.param: Optional: From date inclusive to get invoices from
Optional: To date inclusive to get invoices to
member.response: A list of invoices is returned

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetInvoiceAsync(System.Int32)
member.remarks:
Returns Invoice
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetInvoice?invoiceId=22"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.param: Id of the invoice
member.response: Invoice is returned if found, otherwise null

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetReturnsAsync(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.remarks:
Returns Returns
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetReturns"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.param: Optional: From date inclusive to get returns from
Optional: To date inclusive to get returns to
member.response: A list of returns is returned

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.GetReturnAsync(System.Int32)
member.remarks:
Returns Return
Examplecurl -X GET "https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetInvoice?invoiceId=22"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.param: Id of the return
member.response: Return is returned if found, otherwise null

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.ApiV1Controller.UploadPatientDocumentAsync(TIMS_X.Server.Models.DocumentUpload)
member.remarks: Uploads PDF document to patient record Examplecurl -v -include --form "PatientId=your-patient-id" --form "DocumentTitle=your-document-title" --form "AlertMessage=your-alert-message" --form Document=@your-pdf-file.pdf "https://audhhiapp1.timsaudiology.com:44376/api/v1/UploadPatientDocument" -H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: HHI" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.param: The details of the document upload

member.name: T:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.CustomerController
member.summary: The customer controller provides API endpoints for querying the internal TIMS database for customers and vendor permissions

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.CustomerController.GetConnectionInfoAsync
member.summary: Retrieves the customer server IP address and database name

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.CustomerController.Ping
member.summary: Allows client to ensure it can reach this server.

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.CustomerController.ValidateCustomerAsync
member.summary: Tests a customer database connection. Returns true if it can connect, false otherwise.

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.DataSyncController.GetPracticeAsync
member.remarks:
Returns the details of the practice.
Example curl -X GET "https:https://us.timsaudiology.com/api/v1/GetPractice"
-H "accept: application/json" -H "OfficeCode: Sales" -H "Authorization: your-api-key"
member.response: If exists, the practice details are returned, otherwise null

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.PatientSchedulerController.GetPatientsScheduledAsync(System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.Int32[])
member.summary: Returns a list of all patients scheduled in the provided date range at the provided sites. If no sites (sid) are provided, all sites are queried.

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Api.SchedulerController.GetPatientsScheduledAsync(System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.Int32[])
member.summary: Returns a list of all patients scheduled in the provided date range at the provided sites. If no sites (sid) are provided, all sites are queried.

member.name: T:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Web.ValidationController
member.summary: This controller provides helper API endpoints for the Customer Portal

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Web.ValidationController.ValidateApiUrl(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures api url is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Web.ValidationController.ValidateDatabaseConnectionAsync(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures customer server/database combination is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Web.ValidationController.ValidateCustomerDatabase(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures customer server/database combination is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Web.ValidationController.ValidateCustomerOfficeCode(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures customer office code is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Web.ValidationController.ValidateServerAddress(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures server ip address is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Web.ValidationController.ValidateServerName(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures server name is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Web.ValidationController.ValidateSupportUserEmail(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures support user email is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Web.ValidationController.ValidateSupportUserName(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures support user name is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Web.ValidationController.ValidateVendorApiKey(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures vendor api key is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Web.ValidationController.ValidateVendorName(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures vendor name is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Controllers.Web.ValidationController.ValidateVendorPermissionName(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Remote validation endpoint. Ensures vendor permission name is unique

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Data.TimsInternalDbContext.OnModelCreating(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder)
member.summary: Here we map all the tables out. In other db contexts, the mapping is done in ModelConfigurator.cs and shared among data services. Since we only ever need one db context to connect to TIMSInternal, the mapping is done here. The mapping was originally generated with the command "dotnet ef dbcontext scaffold" then copied over

member.name: T:TIMS_X.Server.Filters.ChangePasswordFilter
member.summary: This filter gets injected into the Http request pipeline and every request runs through it. It won't let the user continue until they change their password.

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Filters.ChangePasswordFilter.OnAuthorization(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.AuthorizationFilterContext)
member.summary: Checks if the user cookie contains claim "CP" (Change Password). If true, forces user to change password page.

member.summary: Side the audiogram should display on

member.summary: Static class for the audiogram constants

member.summary: This class gets inserted into the request pipeline and validates all requests that require an api key.

member.summary: Invoke the middleware on a request to require api key authentication

member.summary: This class gets inserted into the request pipeline and validates all requests that require an api key.

member.summary: Invoke the middleware on a request to require api key authentication

member.name: T:TIMS_X.Server.Models.Noah.RootxSection
member.summary: Struct used to export Noah data

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioCallResponse.CallSid
member.summary: The id of the Call as provided by Twilio.

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioCallResponse.Digits
member.summary: The digits that the user pressed, including the termination symbol (*, #, etc...).

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioCallScriptRequest.CallSid
member.summary: The id of the Call as provided by Twilio.

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioSmsResponse.AccountSid
member.summary: The 34 character id of the Account this message is associated with.

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioSmsResponse.Body
member.summary: The text body of the SMS message. Up to 160 characters long.

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioSmsResponse.From
member.summary: The phone number that sent this message.

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioSmsResponse.SmsSid
member.summary: A 34 character unique identifier for the message. May be used to later retrieve this message from the REST API.

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioSmsResponse.To
member.summary: The phone number of the recipient.

member.name: P:TIMS_X.Server.Models.TwilioSmsStatus.SmsSid
member.summary: The id of the SMS as provided by Twilio.

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Queries.PatientQuery.CalculateBatchesAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Given a batch size n, this routine will return a list of Patient ID Pairs. Each ID Pair has n records between them, including themselves.

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Services.ImagingService._CleanupExpiredVideoFilesAsync
member.summary: Deletes videos files that have expired (the video is still in the database) to save hard drive space

member.summary: Writer to write out NHA data

member.summary: Gets or sets the position of the writer

member.summary: Writes out a blob of data
member.param: Data
True if compression needed

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Services.NoahService._FormatDateTimeWW3(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Formats a date time to WW3 standaard

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Services.NoahService._LimitLength(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: returns a substring of the input string that is no longer than the length provided

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Services.NoahService._ConvertXMLToByteArray(System.Xml.Linq.XDocument)
member.summary: Converts an xml documen to a byte array

member.name: M:TIMS_X.Server.Services.PatientMessagingService._GetLanguageEnum(System.String)
member.summary: Try to find language enum matching languageCode. Return American English if no match.
